title: Requirements: remove enc_balance_to_update_sender
description: Gather requirements for removing enc_balance_to_update_sender from Transfer protocol

title: Answer remove-enc-balance-sender requirements
description: Answer requirement questions for removing enc_balance_to_update_sender and document the decision.

title: Draft design for remove-enc-balance-sender
description: Draft requirements and design docs for transfer protocol simplification.

title: Review design: remove enc balance sender
description: Adversarial review of requirements and design for the repo-wide change removing enc_balance_to_update_sender in favor of enc_total only.

title: Research remove-enc-balance-sender
description: Ground approved design in repo reality: protocol docs, crypto serialization, contract ABI, frontend, and tests for removing enc_balance_to_update_sender/r_sender/constraint 8.

title: Plan remove-enc-balance-sender
description: Create the upstream implementation/test plan for removing enc_balance_to_update_sender and using only enc_total across the repo.

title: Write code tasks for remove-enc-balance-sender
description: Create code-task files from the approved plan, mirror only step 1 into runtime tasks, record progress, and emit tasks.ready.

title: Lock reduced transfer proof API in crypto tests
description: Backed by .agents/scratchpad/implementation/remove-enc-balance-sender/tasks/task-01-lock-reduced-transfer-proof-api-in-crypto-tests.code-task.md. Update transfer circuit tests to enforce the reduced public/private proof shape before implementation.

title: Implement Step 3: update Solidity transfer ABI and generated metadata
description: Implement the approved breaking change in PrivateTransfer.sol, Hardhat tests, and regenerated ABI metadata by removing enc_balance_to_update_sender and keeping only encTotal.

title: Implement Step 4: update frontend transfer flow
description: Implement .agents/scratchpad/implementation/remove-enc-balance-sender/tasks/task-04-update-frontend-transfer-flow.code-task.md and validate with pnpm next:check-types plus pnpm next:build.

title: Sync protocol documentation
description: Update docs/Protocol_Design.md so the protocol description, calldata accounting, witness inputs, removed constraint, and documented transfer ABI all match the reduced encTotal-only implementation from Steps 2-4.

title: Commit remove-enc-balance-sender
description: Create the final conventional commit after the validated remove-enc-balance-sender implementation.
